no: Sequencer Colored Text by Gamemacik. Adds pink/red color to Spell Sequencer, Spell Trigger, Contingency, and Chain Contingency combat log messages, plus gold for Vorpal Hit. Purely cosmetic — modifies dialog.tlk string entries with color codes. Many TLK IDs are SCS-specific (enemy sequencer/contingency names), so install after SCS for full coverage. No hard dependencies, works without SCS but covers fewer strings.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

dependencies.reason: Many colored TLK entries (40000-73000 range) are SCS-created sequencer/contingency names. Without SCS, those strings don't exist and the color patching has no effect on them.

sum: Adds colored text indicators to spell sequencers and contingencies, making it easier to distinguish between different queued spells in the interface.

co.no: Colors ~60 combat log strings pink/red: Spell Sequencer fired/contents, Spell Trigger fired/contents, Contingency/Chain Contingency fired/contents, plus Elminster pipe/evasion, tattoo abilities. Also colors Vorpal Hit text gold. Patches dialog.tlk directly via STRING_SET_EVALUATE.
